verses.text: Hih hun khit ciangin David in Topa thu dong a, “Judah khuapi khat peuhpeuhah ka paito ding hiam?” a ci hi. Topa in ama kiangah, “Paito in,” a ci hi. David in, “Koi penah paito ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Hebron-ah,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua lai-ah David paito a, ama zi nihte, Jezreel khua mi Ahinoam leh Karmel khua mi Nabal' zi meigongnu Abigail zong a pai uh hi
David in amah tawh a om a mite, mi khempeuh a innkuanpih ciat tawh paipihto a, Hebron khua-ah amaute a teng uh hi
Tua ciangin Judah mite hong pai-in amaute in tua lai munah Judah kumpi dingin David sathau a nilh uh hi. Amaute in David kiangah, “Saul a vuite pen Jabeshgilead mite hi,”ci-in a gen uh ciangin
Jabeshgilead mite kiangah David in kamtaite sawlin amaute kiangah, “Note in na topa uh Saul tungah thumanna lakin amah vui na hih manun Topa in note thupha hong pia ta hen
Tu-in Topa in itna kip leh thumanna note tungah hong lak ta hen! Note hih bangin gamta na hih manun note tungah thuhoih kong bawl ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in note kithakhauhsakin hang un; bang hang hiam cih leh na topa uh Saul si a, Judah mite in amau' tungah kumpi-in kei sathau hong nilh khin uh hi,” a ci hi.
Tu-in Ner' tapa Abner, Saul' galkapmangpa in Saul' tapa Ishbosheth la-in Mahanaim-ah paipih hi
Amah in Gilead, Ashur, Jezreel, Efraim, Benjamin, leh Israel khempeuh tungah kumpi-in amah bawl hi
Israel-te tungah uk dingin a kipatin Saul' tapa Ishbosheth kum sawmli pha a, amah in kum nih sung uk hi. Ahih hangin Judah minamte in David' nung zui uh hi
Judah minamte tungah kumpi-in Hebron-ah David kum sagih leh kha guk sung a om hi
Ner' tapa Abner leh Saul' tapa Ishbosheth' nasemte Mahanaim panin Gibeon-ah paikhia uh hi
Zeruiah' tapa Joab leh David' nasemte paikhia-in Gibeon bualah amaute dawntuah uh hi. Amaute bual langkhatah, adang khatte a bual langkhatah tu uh hi
Tua ciangin Abner in Joab kiangah, “Tangvalte ding sakin eite' mai-ah kimawlsak ni,” a ci hi. Joab in, “Amaute dingsak in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute dingin galkah uh a, Benjamin leh Saul' tapa Ishbosheth-a' dingin sawmlenih, leh David' nasemte zong sawmlenih mah ahi hi
Tua ciangin alang ciat uh lutang lenin, a namsau tawh alangpa dawt ciat uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute tukkhawm uh hi. Tua ahih manin Gibeon-ah a om tua mun pen Helkathhazzurim kici hi
Tua ni-in galkidona nasia mahmah a, Abner leh Israel mite David' nasemte in zo uh hi
Zeruiah' tapa thumte, Joab, Abishai, leh Asahel, tua lai-ah om uh hi. Asahel pen Syria sakhi lee bangin a khe manlang hi
Asahel in Abner delh a, amah a delh laitakin Abner a zuihna-ah pial hetloin delh paisuak hi
Tua ciangin Abner in a nung enin, “Asahel aw, nang na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Keimah ka hi hi,” a ci hi
Abner in ama kiangah, “Na taklamah ahi a, na veilamah ahi zongin kihei in la, tangvalte khatpeuh manin a na sut in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah a zuihna panin Asahel piallo hi

Tua ciangin Abner in Asahel kiangah, “Keimah zuihna panin pial in; bang hangin nang lei-ah hong vatgawp ding ka hi hiam? Nang hong vatgawp leng na sanggampa Joab' mai-ah ka maitang bangci lak ding ka hi hiam?” a ci kik hi

Ahih hangin amah lampial nuamlo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Abner in a teipi tong lamin a gil khawh a, a nungah a teipi lengsuak hi. Tua ciangin amah tukin tua phualah a si hi. Asahel tukin a sihna munah a pai mi khempeuh tangloin a ding uh hi
Ahih hangin Joab leh Abishai in Abner delh ding kipan uh hi. Ni a tum laitakin Gibeon gamlak paina lampi-a om Giah mai-ah a kikhung Ammah mual a tung uh hi
Tua ciangin Abner a pawlpih Benjamin-te kikaikhawm uh a, amaute pawlkhat suakin mual dawn khatah a pang uh hi

Tua ciangin Abner in Joab samin, “Mi hih bangin kithat lai ding ahi hiam? A tawpna-ah a haksat zawkna ding theilo na hi hiam? A sanggamte uh a delhna panin na mite a kiheina dingin na thupiak ding bangtan sawtlai ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Joab in, “Pasian a nungta ahih mah bangin, hong paulo hi lecin, a sanggamte uh a delhna panin zingsang mateng mite khawllo taktak ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Joab in peengkul tum hi. Mi khempeuh khawl a, Israel-te delh nawnloin amaute in do nawnlo uh hi
Tua ciangin Abner leh a mite Arabah kantanin tua zan tawntung pai uh hi. Amaute in Jordan kantan uh a, sun ma sungteng pai-in Mahanaim tung uh hi
Abner a delhna panin Joab ciahkik hi. Amah in mi khempeuh a kaihkhop khit ciangin Asahel simlohin David' nasemte mi sawmkualekua kisam hi
Ahih hangin David' nasemte in Abner-a' ahi Benjamin-te mihing za thum leh sawmguk that uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in Asahel la-in Bethlehem-ah a om ama pa' hanah a vui uh hi. Tua ciangin Joab leh a mite zan tawntung pai uh a, Hebron-ah khua a vak hi.
